content.full_text:
June 25, 2002

Tony M. Ferrara
759 Via Bandolero
Arroyo Grande, CA 93420

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-02-072

Dear Mr. Ferrara:

Pursuant to your telephone conversation with our office on June 20, 2002, this letter confirms that your request seeking advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act is withdrawn.

If you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Kenneth L. Glick
Counsel, Legal Division
